coreIssue: This onboarding check-in is mainly about whether Sam’s hesitation to ship comes from normal junior ramp-up or fixable gaps in tooling and handoff expectations.
openingQuestion: What feels most uncertain between finishing a ticket and deciding it is ready to ship right now?
listenFor: whether he names a specific step, tool, or approval point that makes him pause
whether if they describe late reassurance requests as waiting until the last minute versus not knowing who to ask earlier
whether he volunteers a concrete recent ticket or stays general about what "done" means
avoid: do not frame his caution as a confidence problem before you test for unclear process or tooling
do not overload a junior onboarding check-in with broad performance feedback beyond the shipping and handoff loop
goodOutcome: You and Sam have agreed what "ready to ship" means for his current junior frontend tickets and which support touchpoint he should use before he gets stuck late.
suggestedAction: Before the 1:1, pick one recent ticket where Sam hesitated and map the exact handoff steps so you can test which step felt unclear.
